name: Anthropic Team
description: High-signal Anthropic launches verified against official Anthropic, Claude, and Claude Help sources.
headline: Verified Anthropic launches across {days} days.
subtitle: October 24, 2025 — April 27, 2026. Company-level launches from official Anthropic sources.
footnote: Cross-checked on May 4, 2026 against Anthropic News, Claude blog posts, and Claude Help Center release notes.

releases.title: Claude Team plan governance updates
releases.description: Anthropic shipped expanded team governance controls, including workspace-level policy presets and audit-friendly activity views for Claude Team admins.

releases.title: Claude desktop rollout for Windows
releases.description: Anthropic broadened Claude desktop availability on Windows with enterprise deployment support and SSO improvements.

releases.title: Constitutional classifier update
releases.description: Anthropic published an updated constitutional classifier stack aimed at reducing jailbreak susceptibility while improving harmlessness/utility tradeoffs in production systems.

releases.title: Cowork research preview
releases.description: Claude Desktop gained Cowork for multi-step knowledge work on local files and connected tools.

releases.title: Anthropic Labs expansion
releases.description: Anthropic expanded its internal Labs incubator, named Instagram co-founder Mike Krieger as co-lead alongside Ben Mann, and announced plans to double the team. Labs is the unit behind Claude Code, MCP, and Cowork.

releases.title: Economic Index: Economic Primitives report
releases.description: Research report introducing five foundational metrics for AI's economic impact, finding augmentation now exceeds automation in Claude.ai conversations (52% vs 45%).

releases.title: Claude's new model spec (constitution)
releases.description: Anthropic published a 23,000-word updated model spec under CC0, replacing the 2023 ~2,700-word version. First major AI company to formally acknowledge potential model consciousness and moral status.

releases.title: Interactive connectors and MCP Apps
releases.description: Anthropic introduced interactive connectors and app surfaces that run directly inside Claude conversations.

releases.title: Claude Opus 4.6
releases.description: Flagship model with 1M token context, 128k output tokens, adaptive thinking, and agent-team task splitting. Topped agentic coding, computer use, and tool-use benchmarks.

releases.title: Anthropic Transparency Hub
releases.description: Centralized hub for model cards, safety commitments tracker, third-party evaluations, RSP v3.0 status, and release notes in one navigable interface.

releases.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6
releases.description: Anthropic launched Sonnet 4.6 as the new balanced flagship across speed, coding, and reasoning.

releases.title: Cowork and plugins for teams across the enterprise
releases.description: Claude expanded Cowork with plugins, admin controls, and broader enterprise workflows.

releases.title: Vercept acquisition
releases.description: Anthropic announced its acquisition of Vercept to strengthen Claude’s computer-use capabilities and agent reliability research.

releases.title: Memory for free users
releases.description: Chat search and memory rolled out to free Claude users instead of staying limited to paid tiers.

releases.title: The Anthropic Institute
releases.description: New public-benefit research body to address societal challenges from powerful AI, led by co-founder Jack Clark as Head of Public Benefit.

releases.title: Advancing Claude for Excel and PowerPoint
releases.description: Claude's Microsoft add-ins began sharing context across Excel and PowerPoint and added skills support.

releases.title: Claude Partner Network — $100M investment
releases.description: Formalized enterprise partner channel (Accenture, Deloitte, Cognizant, Infosys) with $100M in 2026 funding, 5× partner-facing team growth, and the first Claude Certified Architect credential.

releases.title: Claude builds interactive visuals right in your conversation
releases.description: Claude started creating inline charts, diagrams, and visual explanations directly in chat.

releases.title: Google + Broadcom compute partnership expansion
releases.description: Anthropic announced a multi-gigawatt next-generation compute expansion with Google and Broadcom.

releases.title: Claude Mythos Preview — Project Glasswing
releases.description: Anthropic unveiled Claude Mythos Preview, a cybersecurity-focused model released to 11 organizations under Project Glasswing to find and fix vulnerabilities in critical software.

releases.title: Cowork goes GA with computer use and enterprise controls
releases.description: Anthropic documented Cowork general availability for paid Claude plans, including computer use for Pro/Max and enterprise controls in official Claude release notes.

releases.title: Anthropic launches Claude Opus 4.7
releases.description: Anthropic released Opus 4.7 across consumer products, API (claude-opus-4-7), Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, and Microsoft Foundry at unchanged $5/$25 per MTok pricing, with new cybersecurity safeguards and a Cyber Verification Program for security researchers.

releases.title: Anthropic Labs introduces Claude Design
releases.description: Anthropic Labs announced Claude Design, a conversational tool that turns chat requests into designs, interactive prototypes, slides, and one-pagers on a shared canvas; available in research preview to Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans (off by default for Enterprise).

releases.title: Anthropic and NEC partner on Japan's largest AI engineering workforce
releases.description: Anthropic announced its first Japan-based global partnership with NEC. Claude (including Opus 4.7) and Claude Code roll out to ~30,000 NEC employees globally; NEC will embed Claude into its Security Operations Center services and its BluStellar product family, and launch a Center of Excellence with Anthropic-supported training to build one of Japan's largest AI-native engineering teams.

releases.title: Claude Government controls update
releases.description: Anthropic added government-grade tenancy and auditing controls for regulated deployments of Claude in high-assurance environments.
